This dataset includes information from the EU’s TED (Tenders Electronic Daily).
© European Union, reused under Commission Decision 2011/833/EU.

You are free to:
- Use the dataset commercially and non-commercially
- Modify, transform, and build upon it
- Redistribute it in any form

Conditions:
- You must provide proper attribution: “Contains data from TED (Tenders Electronic Daily) © European Union, reused under Commission Decision 2011/833/EU.”
- No warranties are provided. The dataset is offered “as is.”

Additional enrichment (parsing, CPV mapping, and packaging) is © 2025 OpenML Datasets,
released under the Creative Commons Zero v1.0 Universal (CC0).
